description: Pepper Foster Consulting is a strategic project consulting firm with offices in Atlanta, Minneapolis, and Portland, OR. We help our clients in the agriculture, apparel, consumer products, energy, financial services, food & beverage, healthcare, industrial manufacturing, technology, transportation, and utility industries figure stuff out and get stuff done. What makes us different though isn’t what we do, it’s why and how we do it. We do it because we want to make a difference. Because it’s fun to have an impact and make people happy. And we do it by hiring great people.
